title: Jonatan Pettersson
text: Home * People * Jonatan Pettersson Jonatan Pettersson [1] Jonatan Pettersson , a Swedish computer scientist and Java developer. He is author of the chess engine Mediocre , written in Java [2] , and maintains the Mediocre Chess blog , covering the development of his engine and various topics on chess programming, also recently announcing he is working on a new bitboard based Java engine [3] .
